data.content: Applied a restrained settings theme pass instead of a redesign: updated the global palette to soft purple/green tokens, wrapped settings sections in consistent themed cards, and tuned controls/buttons/rows for cohesive accent treatment while preserving layout and behavior. Verified with bun run lint (warnings only, 0 errors), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and NODE_ENV=production bun run build. Pushed directly to origin/main as 3dbb8e1.
